programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira tries to get out of jury duty; David runs damage control for a Rose Apothecary product.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Between Mike troubles, a Tru Air P.R. crisis and a birthday dinner with less-than-delightful in-laws, Kate's plate is full; a misstep from Alice puts Anne's book in jeopardy, and Jenny goes on the warpath for equal pay.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate and Nathan struggle with their new living arrangement; Frankie and Juniper take their investigation of Sean too far; Anne looks at her relationship with Alice in a new light.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: A lice outbreak at camp becomes everyone's worst nightmare; Kate's interview soon proves somewhat uncomfortable. Anne quarantines her house while Frankie tries to sell a home under false pretences.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate finds herself in the middle of a PR crisis for her new client Après; Anne is inspired by a new book idea; Frankie and Bianca discover the truth about Sean.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate desperately searches the brewery for Charlie while Frankie seizes an opportunity for vengeful justice; Jenny's employers see things her way; Anne and Lionel make a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Shannon tries to build a more inclusive culture at work; Lara interferes in a radio contest.

programme.title: Baroness von Sketch Show
programme.desc: Tips for bingeing on drama; suggestions for what to say at a funeral; a corporate listening circle.

programme.title: CBC Winnipeg Comedy Festival
programme.desc: Hosted by Pete Zedlacher; performances by Matt Falk, Danish Anwar, Jess Salomon, Martha Chaves, Nitish Sahkuja and Ryan Williams.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa attempts to get cheap Wi-Fi; Janet is forced to do a reading at church; Jung and Katie hit it off.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa becomes the star of Gerald's photo essay; Umma realizes that her family doesn't completely trust her; Jenny makes a social faux pas.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Jung try out the old family ping pong table; Umma's feelings get hurt when Janet refuses to hang out with her; a gift basket causes problems.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.sub-title: Gerry Wants What He Can't Trans
programme.desc: Gerry takes control of the girl's soccer team to get back at Coach Meyers; an ambitious mom seduces Frank; Lisa's reign of terror seemingly comes to an end.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry's least-favorite student becomes Principal for a Day; a harmless prank goes sour; Bobbi accidentally ruins a student's life.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Robert hires a security guard after a string of thefts; Robert learns the truth behind his baby's name.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark uncovers proof Sister Rose cheated but hesitates to publish; Mike Sr. covers the Meech Lake Accord as Mary scores an exclusive; Pop does some redecorating.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.sub-title: Got to Get Me Moose B'y
programme.desc: On a moose hunting trip, tensions rise between Pop and Poppy Bell, putting Mark in a difficult situation; Fox is wary of his mother's new boyfriend; Mike Sr. worries about his future at VOCM.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Singles Week kicks off just as Jocelyn's baby is born; Patrick and David take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny wants to celebrate the holidays with an old-fashioned Rose Family Christmas Party, but it takes a lot to get everyone on board at the last minute; Moira brings a negative attitude to Christmas tree shopping.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira films a movie in Bosnia, hoping to revive her career; David tries to take his relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira loses sleep stressing over old love letters; David and Stevie get held up at the store.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate desperately searches the brewery for Charlie while Frankie seizes an opportunity for vengeful justice; Jenny's employers see things her way; Anne and Lionel make a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: The Carlsons make the move, but it's not exactly what Lionel promised; Alice meets a cute boy at her new school; Kate and the gang fly out for a visit, and they discover Anne has made some questionable new friends.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate feels the pressure to land a major new client; Anne is torn between hanging on to her ambition and succumbing to the rhythm of life as a Cochrane mom; with Bianca away, Frankie buys Rhoda a strange new pet.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate walks farther into the lioness's den with Sloane; Anne starts her new job; Alice gets closer with her new boyfriend; Jenny discovers her secret office romance with MCP might not be exactly what she expected.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.sub-title: Gerry Wants What He Can't Trans
programme.desc: Gerry takes control of the girl's soccer team to get back at Coach Meyers; an ambitious mom seduces Frank; Lisa's reign of terror seemingly comes to an end.
